title: Avena thellungii
intro: Avena thellungii, also known as Avena, is a species of oat plant native to the Himalayan region, traditionally used as a medicinal herb. It has been associated with various health benefits, including stress relief, improved sleep quality, and reduction in anxiety and depression. The bioactive constituents of Avena thellungii include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and avenanthramides, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Avena thellungii is commonly prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in the form of oat flour and oat extracts.
